message:
fix(combinator+browser): remove stale sliding window reset on HalfOpen→Closed, rustfmt browser reactor

1. **Circuit breaker (circuit_breaker.rs)**: Removes the redundant
   sliding_window.reset() on the HalfOpen→Closed transition — the
   window is already cleared when the breaker opens (see prior
   commit), so this second reset was dead code after a successful
   half-open probe.

2. **Browser reactor (browser.rs)**: Import ordering and assert!()
   macro formatting normalized by rustfmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
